title: Shudehill Giftware Ceramic Garden Tealight House - Nan, Life and Home To choose from, Decorative Home Ornament with Floral Design (Life)
features: DESIGN: Charming ceramic house-shaped tealight holder featuring a delightful garden theme with floral illustrations and a pink roof
SENTIMENT: Features the heartwarming message 'Nans are the flowers in life's garden' with decorative flowers and garden motifs
DETAILS: Beautifully decorated with garden imagery including wellies, a wheelbarrow, and colourful flowers alongside a sweet bee detail
FUNCTIONALITY: Multiple window openings and cut-outs allow candlelight to create a warm, inviting glow when lit
GIFTING: Perfect decorative ornament for Nan's home, combining both practical use as a tealight holder and sentimental value
description: Add a charming touch of warmth to your home with this delightful ceramic tealight house from Shudehill Giftware. Beautifully crafted with a pink roof and white walls, this decorative piece features an endearing garden theme with colourful floral illustrations and a sweet bumble bee motif. The house displays the heartwarming message 'Nans are the flowers in life's garden', making it a perfect gift for beloved grandmothers. When lit, the tealight creates a cosy glow through the windows and doorway, casting gentle shadows that bring this miniature dwelling to life. The intricate details include charming garden accessories like blue watering cans and wheelbarrows adorned with flowers. This thoughtful ornament serves both as a lovely decorative piece and a meaningful tribute to cherished family relationships. Place it on a mantelpiece, windowsill, or side table to create an inviting atmosphere in any room.
